pages.title: Habesha Network
pages.text: Habesha Network (habeshanetwork.com) is a large multi-vertical marketplace and community platform for the Habesha ecosystem. In one product it combines: e-commerce (buy and sell products), a real estate marketplace (properties), a job marketplace, a professional-services layer (clients finding vetted pros — comparable in spirit to Angi / HomeAdvisor-style discovery and booking), and broader community features: meetups, news, events, and blogging / editorial content. Engineering focus is production-grade multi-sided marketplace infrastructure: listings, search and discovery, trust and reputation, notifications, and scalable backends — not a single-purpose marketing site.
